texto: Without the participation of one fifth of the global population, without the endorsement of the world's second-largest economy, without the political will and security guarantee of this emerging power, international institutions and norms will be irrelevant and the legitimacy and credibility of their resolutions and arrangements will fall short of promise.
explicacao: Citação de Wang Yizhou sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Without the participation of one fifth of the global population, without the endorsement of the w…” articula reflexao, china, foreign-policy em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e foreign-policy.
